notes: PendingActivationPage/LoginPage account-status copy endpoint. Returns ConsoleAccountStatusView from a static dependency-free auth handler instead of 404 NO_ROUTE.
reads params.page/pageSize/status; requireSuperadmin(actor.type==='superadmin')
reads params.slug/displayName/capabilities/quotaDimensions; 201; event emission no-op (no kafka producer); validates capability keys vs boolean_capability_catalog

reads params.planIdOrSlug (path). Action allows actor.type 'superadmin' or 'tenant-owner' (hyphen); server emits tenant_owner (underscore) so only superadmin passes the action's own check. auth left authenticated so the action self-decides.
reads params.planId (path) + params.displayName/description/capabilities/quotaDimensions (body); event emission no-op (no kafka)
hard-deletes never-assigned plans only; assigned or historically assigned plans return PLAN_HAS_ASSIGNMENT_HISTORY and must be archived instead
reads params.planId (path) + params.targetStatus (body); event emission no-op (no kafka)
reads params.planId (path)
reads params.planId + params.dimensionKey (path) + params.value/quotaType/graceMargin (body); event emission no-op (no kafka)
reads params.planId + params.dimensionKey (path); event emission no-op (no kafka)
reads params.tenantId (path) + params.planId/assignedBy (body); writes tenant_plan_assignments + effective entitlements; event + metric emission no-op (no kafka/metricRecorder)

reads params.tenantId (path) or actor.tenantId. Action self-checks: superadmin any, actor.type 'tenant-owner' (hyphen) own only (server emits tenant_owner underscore, so tenant owner self-access 403s in the action).
self variant; no tenantId path, resolves actor.tenantId. Same hyphen-vs-underscore actor.type caveat as the admin variant.
reads params.tenantId (path) + params.page/pageSize (query)
reads params.tenantId (path) + params.page/pageSize/actorId/from/to (query); requireInternal (superadmin|internal only)
self; resolves actor.tenantId. Action requires actor.type==='tenant-owner' (hyphen) — server emits tenant_owner (underscore), so this returns 403 for tenant owners as-is. Left authenticated.
self; reads params.include (query). Action accepts actor.type tenant_owner|tenant-owner|tenant for self; superadmin/internal needs params.tenantId.
admin/self; reads params.tenantId (path) + params.include (query); cross-tenant 403 guard for non-superadmin

UNCERTAIN: route path uses {planId} but the action reads params.tenantId (resolves from actor or requires params.tenantId via query) and IGNORES planId. For superadmin pass ?tenantId=. Effectively a tenant-scoped reader despite the plans-prefixed path.
self; resolves actor.tenantId. Accepts tenant_owner|tenant-owner|tenant; superadmin needs params.tenantId.
admin/self; reads params.tenantId (path); cross-tenant 403 guard
self; resolves actor.tenantId. Aggregates workspace_sub_quotas per dimension.
admin/self; reads params.tenantId (path); cross-tenant 403 guard
self route used by ConsoleWorkspaceDashboardPage; derives tenantId from trusted callerContext.actor.tenantId and reads params.workspaceId
reads params.tenantId + params.workspaceId (path); superadmin/tenant-owner own/workspace_admin own ws

UNCERTAIN tenantId source: reads params.tenantId AND params.workspaceId, but route only supplies {workspaceId} from path; tenantId must come from actor.tenantId (works only when JWT carries tenant_id). event emission no-op (no kafka)
no inputs; requireSuperadmin
reads params.tenantId (path) or actor.tenantId; tenant-owner own only (strips overrideMetadata)
reads params.tenantId (path) + params.dimensionKey/overrideValue/justification/quotaType/graceMargin/expiresAt (body); event emission no-op (no kafka)
reads params.tenantId (path) + params.dimensionKey/status/page/pageSize (query)
reads params.overrideId (path) + params.overrideValue/justification/quotaType/graceMargin/expiresAt (body); event emission no-op (no kafka)

reads params.overrideId (path) + params.justification (body). UNCERTAIN: justification is mandatory (assertJustification) and must arrive in a DELETE body; if console sends it as a query param instead, switch to mergeQueryIntoParams. event emission no-op (no kafka)
reads params.tenantId (path) + params.dimensionKey/actorId/from/to (query); tenant-owner forced to own tenant
reads params.tenantId/workspaceId/dimensionKey/allocatedValue (body); 422 if exceeds tenant effective limit; superadmin/tenant-owner own/workspace_admin own ws; event emission no-op (no kafka)
reads params.tenantId/workspaceId/dimensionKey/limit/offset (query). Note: limit/offset only apply when integers; query strings fail Number.isInteger so they always default to 50/0.

reads params.tenantId/workspaceId/dimensionKey. UNCERTAIN: DELETE has no path/body, so these must arrive as query params; if the console sends a JSON body instead, switch to mergeBodyIntoParams. event emission no-op (no kafka)
reads params.tenantId (path); superadmin/internal any, tenant_owner own only (403 cross-tenant). tenant_plan_adjustments read tolerates missing table (42P01).
self variant; resolves actor.tenantId
reads params.includeInactive (query); requireSuperadmin

reads params.auth + params.workspaceId (path) + params.tenantId/memberId (query). UNCERTAIN: action REQUIRES params.tenantId but the route only supplies {workspaceId}; caller must pass ?tenantId=. allowed() needs roles platform_admin or tenant_owner+matching tenantId.
reads params.auth + params.workspaceId (path) + params.tenantId/requiredDomain/actorId/from/to/limit/offset (query). platform_admin needs ?tenantId=; tenant_owner forced to own tenant.

CORRECTED invoke: map said params-auth-overrides but the action reads params.callerContext.actor + params.callerContext.tenantId, NOT params.auth -> callercontext-overrides. Path param renamed {tenantId}->{tenant_id} because admins read params.tenant_id; non-admins are forced to callerContext.tenantId. Reads from/to (required) + denial_type/workspace_id/actor_id/limit/cursor (query).
ConsoleRealtimePage config endpoint. Tenant scope is verified against the workspace owner; returns WorkspaceRealtimeResponse shape and 200 empty config when no realtime_channels rows exist.
EventsConsole topic list. Handler resolves the workspace, verifies tenant ownership, and returns {items:[{topic,partitions,resourceId,topicName}]} instead of 404 NO_ROUTE.
EventsConsole topic create. Handler reads body.name, requires tenant owner/admin or platform, provisions the managed Kafka topic, and returns 201.
EventsConsole logical-topic publish. Handler resolves the owned workspace/topic row, normalizes {key,value} to Kafka payload semantics, and returns 202 instead of 404 NO_ROUTE.
EventsConsole logical-topic message poll. Handler resolves the owned workspace/topic row, consumes a bounded batch from Kafka, and returns {items:[{key,value,partition,offset,timestamp}]}.
ConsoleAuthPage external applications list. Handler resolves the workspace first, allows same-tenant reads, and returns 200 empty collection for owned workspaces instead of 404 NO_ROUTE.
ConsoleAuthPage external application create. Handler owns tenant write gate (tenant_owner/admin or platform) and returns 202 or structured 400 VALIDATION_ERROR, never NO_ROUTE.
Workspace external application starter templates from the existing IAM helper, scoped by a real workspace lookup.
Read one workspace external application after workspace tenant scope verification.
Update or soft-delete one workspace external application. Handler requires tenant owner/admin or platform and validates canonical application shape.
List federated providers embedded in the external application JSONB document after workspace tenant scope verification.
Create one embedded federated provider. Handler requires tenant owner/admin or platform and returns structured validation errors.
Read one embedded federated provider after workspace and application scope verification.
Update one embedded federated provider. Handler requires tenant owner/admin or platform and rejects providerId changes.

parseIdentity from __ow_headers requires BOTH x-tenant-id AND x-workspace-id (401 otherwise) -> the JWT must carry workspace_id. Identity (tenant+workspace) comes from headers, NOT the {workspaceId} path. reads params.status (query).
pure GET, no DB; parseConfigIdentity needs x-tenant-id + scope platform:admin:config:export OR role superadmin/sre
reads params.tenant_id (path) via parseConfigIdentity; tenantExists defaults to true (no DB needed); scope platform:admin:config:export
reads params.tenant_id (path) + params.domains (body); overrides.db; event emission no-op (no kafka); scope platform:admin:config:export
reads params.tenant_id (path) + params.artifact/domains/identifier_map (body); read-only; scope platform:admin:config:reprovision
reads params.tenant_id (path) + params.artifact/dry_run/domains/identifier_map (body); event emission no-op (no kafka); scope platform:admin:config:reprovision
reads params.tenant_id (path) + body fields; event emission no-op (no kafka); scope platform:admin:config:reprovision
pure validation, no DB; artifact = params.artifact ?? params (so merge the body); scope platform:admin:config:export
pure migration, no DB; artifact = params.artifact ?? params; scope platform:admin:config:export
reads params.profile (query); action requires actor.type superadmin|sre (server emits superadmin); event emission no-op (no kafka). Reads deployment_profile_registry + backup_scope_entries.

reads params.tenantId (path); action accepts actor.type superadmin|sre OR 'tenant:owner'/'tenant:admin' (colon format) — server emits tenant_owner (underscore), so only superadmin passes the action's own check as-is. event emission no-op (no kafka).

callerContext from buildCallerContext(__ow_headers) needs x-auth-subject + (x-tenant-id or x-actor-type); db=overrides.db. Reads flat params.queryType/operationId/filters/pagination (body). Internal sub-routing by queryType (list|detail|logs|result); tenant isolation enforced.

Wildcard (mirrors tests/env /v1/scheduling(/.*)? GET|POST|PATCH|DELETE) so the action's internal sub-router off params.method+params.path works (jobs, jobs/{id}, jobs/{id}/pause, config, summary). Reads params.pg + params.query/params.body objects (NO flatten). parseIdentity needs x-tenant-id AND x-workspace-id (401 otherwise).
